name: Secret Ingredient Dip
recipeInstructions:
1 Catch a sea cucumber; the flavor is well worth the effort.
2 Rip it open and remove the long, thin white muscles that run lengthwise down the middle. Discard the rest.
3 Cook the muscles for a few minutes until they appear done. Then mince, grind, or whip them in a blender.
4 Combine all ingredients.
5 Chill.
6 Serve in a bowl surrounded by potato chips or crackers. If you don't reveal what the secret ingredient is, people will rave for more!
